name: fire-weather
description: John Vaillant's Fire Weather — climate crisis narrative exploring the 2016 Fort McMurray megafire, the science of fires that create their own weather, the oil sands paradox, and our entry into the pyrosphere
useCase: Understand the Fort McMurray fire, learn how fire creates weather, explore the climate change connection, and prepare for life in the pyrosphere
knownRisks: The book focuses on a single fire — while representative, it does not cover all types of wildfire globally
Vaillant is a narrative journalist, not a fire scientist — some details may be dramatized
The oil sands industry may dispute Vaillant's framing
